description:
Read a unified knowledge document by type-prefixed path. Skill package root paths read that package's `SKILL.md`; package child docs can be read by their package-relative `.md` path. This tool returns plain-text document content in markdown form, not knowledge metadata or directory config.
- When Headroom is enabled and output exceeds the compress threshold, large document bodies are compressed through headroom-ai (requires headroom proxy or HEADROOM_API_KEY).

path.description: The exact type-prefixed knowledge document path. Preserve every directory segment from `knowledge_list` results. Regular document paths must end with `.md`, for example `design/core-loop.md`, `skill/unity/import-pipeline.md`, or `skill/builtin/profiler.md`. For Skill packages, `skill/<package-id>` reads `SKILL.md`, and `skill/<package-id>/docs/usage.md` reads a package child document.

part.description: Which content section to read. `full` returns the markdown document body, `summary` returns the summary text only, and `body` returns the body text only.
